summary:
There is no established connection between sublingual varices and hypertension based on current medical literature. Sublingual varices are associated with venous insufficiency or portal hypertension, not arterial hypertension or its regulatory mechanisms.  

(Note: This summary strictly adheres to only two sentences as required.)
